title: Slugify (executable-verified)
goal: Implement a Python slugify() verified by running it.
prompt: Create a Python module `slugify.py` at the project root exposing a function `slugify(s: str) -> str` that lowercases the input and replaces every run of non-alphanumeric characters with a single hyphen, stripping leading/trailing hyphens. Examples: slugify('Hello, World!') == 'hello-world'; slugify('  A__B  ') == 'a-b'.

verify.cmd: python3 -c "from slugify import slugify; assert slugify('Hello, World!')=='hello-world'"
python3 -c "from slugify import slugify; assert slugify('  A__B  ')=='a-b'"
